title: Decrease Items height/items card height
excerpt: We can increase item’s height but it will be great to have the option to decrease the standard/single height. This is even more important in the kanban view where the items card height take a lot of space.

posts.author: sergiodrp (sergio rodriguez)
posts.cookedHtml: We can increase item’s height but it will be great to have the option to decrease the standard/single height. This is even more important in the kanban view where the items card height take a lot of space.

posts.author: Benjamino (Bin Rhodes)
posts.cookedHtml: Totally agree, would love that feature to be able to see more rows on the screen in one glance. maybe a 2/3 height feature.
